name: paper-autopilot-open
description: Open edition of a battery / materials science paper-writing feedback-loop orchestrator. Onboarding wizard, dual RAG backend (local vector store by default, Supabase optional), self-built corpus from the user's own papers, and no external plugin hard-dependencies. Idea + figure set → folder → mockup → academic-writing → experimental-plan → loop with version management. Includes adversarial review (pa-forcing-questions, pa-spec-review-loop) — still alpha: SKILL.md + mock dogfood verified, real reviewer dispatch verification deferred.
